diagrams.title: Cohen-Sutherland 9-Region Layout
diagrams.description: Shows clip window divided into 9 regions with center region 0000
elements: 4 edge regions with single bits set
4 corner regions with multiple bits set
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how region codes are assigned based on position relative to clip window boundaries

diagrams.title: Cohen-Sutherland Clipping Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision tree showing algorithm logic from endpoint codes to result
elements: Start → Assign codes → Check AND=0? → Check OR=0? → Trivial Accept/Reject/Clip
diagrams.purpose: Understand algorithm decision process and when trivial cases apply vs clipping needed

diagrams.title: Liang-Barsky Parameter t Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows t parameter axis from 0 to 1 with t0 and t1 bounds
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how parametric approach determines which portion of line is visible

diagrams.title: Line Clipping Categories
diagrams.description: Shows three cases: completely inside, completely outside, partially visible
diagrams.purpose: Understand all possible relationships between line segment and clip window

visuals.title: Line Segment Clipping
visuals.description: Visual diagram for line segment clipping
